title: vitis pontii
intro: Vitis pontii, also known as the Chinese grapevine or wild grape, is a species of grapevine native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis pontii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The herbal preparations of Vitis pontii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves, stems, or roots in hot water.
